data.name: Naughty Christmas Jigsaw
data.detailed_description:
Forget about the nice Santa — this year, the gift is something naughtier.
In Naughty Christmas Jigsaw, the holiday spirit gets a spicy twist: piece together gorgeous (and delicious) hand-drawn puzzles filled with charm and sensuality, all while the cozy soundtrack keeps the winter chill outside.

Feel the pleasure of every fit, every curve, every revealing detail as each piece falls into place. It’s the kind of game that starts innocent… and ends with a mischievous smile. 😈

🎅 Game Highlights:

🧩 Three difficulty levels — choose between 81, 196, or 361 pieces and play at your own pace (or desire).
🎨 7 exclusive hand-drawn artworks, each bursting with festive allure and intricate detail.
💋 A wide variety of girls, each with her own unique charm, style, and attitude.
🎁 Download the images you unlock and build your own private collection of naughty Christmas delights.
🏆 Plenty of achievements to earn and show off — because pleasure is also about progress.
🎶 Seductive holiday soundtrack, blending warmth and temptation.
🌟 Simple, elegant interface, perfect for relaxing and letting yourself get carried away.

Get into the mood — for a cheeky, charming, and desire-filled Christmas.
Naughty Christmas Jigsaw: because sometimes, the best gifts... are the ones you put together piece by piece. 🎁😉

data.short_description: Christmas just got too hot for the snow to handle! 🔥💋 Naughty Christmas Jigsaw blends holiday charm with seductive, provocative imagery — a relaxing, fun, and irresistibly tempting experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 瑞典文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
